# Blooming Cosmos, Blooming Faith
## Scripture
## Reflection
As we step into the vibrant season of Spring, the night sky comes alive with the majestic swirl of the Milky Way, a celestial showcase of God's grand design. Just as the universe is full of mysteries waiting to be unraveled, our walk with God is a journey of discovery, where every moment holds the promise of new beginnings and growth. In the book of Isaiah, we find a powerful reminder of God's unwavering commitment to us: "As the heavens are higher than the earth, so are my ways higher than your ways and my thoughts than your thoughts" (Isaiah 55:9).

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we gaze upon the blooming beauty of the Spring season and the celestial wonders of the night sky, remind us that our faith is also a dynamic, ever-unfolding journey. Just as the Milky Way stretches across the universe, may our trust in You expand, reaching new depths and heights. Help us to embrace the mysteries of Your ways, knowing that they are higher and wiser than our own. As we navigate the seasons of life, may we find comfort in Your promise to guide us, and may our hearts remain open to the blooming possibilities that You have in store for us. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
